# StoryVista | 文景

StoryVista is a multilingual, spoiler-safe visual reading companion for complex novels.

Verified command:

python scripts/storyvista.py build skill/examples/reader-visual-codex-demo/input.txt --out output/reader-visual-codex-demo --ui-language auto

Core v0.3 outputs:

- source-index.json and chunks.json
- language-profile.json
- reader-text.json and entity-linking.json
- character-atlas.json and relationship-web.json
- location-atlas.json and map-plan.json
- object-lore-codex.json and visual-evidence.json
- visual-asset-plan.json and image-manifest.json
- spoiler-state.json, provider-choice-state.json, theme-profile.json
- semantic placeholder SVG assets
- atlas.html and verification-report.md

Supported UI: English and Simplified Chinese.
Experimental UI structures: Traditional Chinese, Japanese, Korean, French, Spanish, German, Russian.
Image providers are optional. Missing providers fall back to local semantic SVG.
Actor, writer, and director modes are future extensions, not core workflow.

Primary references:

- README.md
- README.zh-CN.md
- skill/SKILL.md
- docs/i18n.md
- docs/reader-sync-panel.md
- docs/visual-provider-preflight.md
- docs/theme-engine.md
- docs/agent-compatibility.md
- docs/upgrade-report-reader-visual-codex.md
